---
title: "EPID 638/CMPLXSYS 530 Lab 2"
author: Luka Todorovic
date: "March 10, 2026"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
jupyter: python3
---

# Problem 1

## Part A

## Part B

## Part C

## Part D

## Part E



# Problem 2

## Part A

## Part B

## Part C

## Part D
